query:
SELECT CONCAT(
  'uid=', ul.userId, 
  ' lat=', ROUND(ul.latitude, 4), 
  ' lng=', ROUND(ul.longitude, 4), 
  ' sharing=', ul.isSharing, 
  ' updated=', ul.lastUpdated, 
  ' minsAgo=', TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ul.lastUpdated, NOW()),
  ' name=', COALESCE(p.trainerName, 'null'),
  ' gender=', COALESCE(p.gender, 'null'),
  ' pref=', COALESCE(p.matchGenderPreference, 'null'),
  ' radius=', COALESCE(p.matchRadius, 5)
) as info FROM userLocations ul LEFT JOIN profiles p ON p.userId = ul.userId ORDER BY ul.lastUpdated DESC;
